use_cases: Interactive landing page hero sections with dynamic geometric backgrounds
Portfolio or creative showcase pages featuring generative art
Data visualization dashboards with artistic geometric elements
Product pages or marketing sites seeking unique visual differentiation
ai_summary: An interactive Delaunay triangulation visualization component that renders 150 seeded points connected into geometric triangles with a purple-teal gradient. Uses visx libraries for computation and SVG rendering, featuring mouse hover interactions that highlight individual triangles. Suitable for creative portfolios, landing pages, or any context needing generative geometric art with responsive sizing.
